comment_text:
Canelo is 35, Crawford is 37
Canelo was 17-0 pro when Bud had his first professional fight.
Young 23 year old Canelo was 42-0 when facing Legandary hall of famer and face of Boxing p4p #1 Floyd mayweather (44-0) While 26 year old Crawford  was 21-0. preparing to face Andrey Klimov (16-0).
Up to that point Bud had only fought 2 fighters that had 30 or more professional fights. Canelo  had fought 9 fighters with 30 or more professional fights.
Obviously Canelo being 3 years younger was fighting stronger, tougher competition.
Bud has never faced an Elite fighter with 40 or more professional fights. While Canelo has faced 10 of them. 
At age 31 Bud's record was 35-0
At age 31 Canelos record was 60-1 
At age 31 mike tyson was 46-3
At age 31 Floyd was 39-0
At age 31 Manny pacquiao was 50-2
Crawford  had his first world title fight at the age of 26 on March 1, 2014 after 22 professional fights, against Ricky Burns for the lightweight WBO title.
Canelo had his first world title fight at the age of 20 on March 5, 2011 after 36 professional fights, against Matthew Hattobn for the super-welterweight WBC title.
Crawford has had a total of 18 world-title fights till today, which includes winning 12 world titles and 15 successful title defenses.

Canelo has had a total of 27 world-title fights till today, which includes winning 17 world titles and 18 successful title defenses.
Crawford has won 12 belts across three weight classes.
Canelo has won 17 belts across four weight classes.
Canelo like Crawford started fighting under 140lbs . Canelos first Bout was at 139 and Crawfords at 137.
Canelo proceeded to be undefeated at super light weight, welterweight, and super welterweight. At 20 years old Canelo defeated world champion Matthew Hatton for his first WBC world title . Becoming the WBC super welterweight world champion. 
Canelo then became a unified super-welterweight world champion by beating Austin Traut. Now holding the WBC and WBA and . The Ring super-welterweight world-champion belts.
Canelo remained Undefeated with a record of 42-0 Until he faced The Face of Boxing and Fighter of the Decade, Hall of famer Floyd Mayweather at the age of 23 years old. 
Canelo Continued fighting bigger, stronger boxers after facing Floyd. 
Canelo defeated Multiple time world champion, Miguel Cotto to win WBC and Ring magazine middle weight world tittles. 
Canelo defeated unbeaten champion Liam smith For the WBO Light middle weight tittle.
Then canelo jumps from 154 to 164 to defeat former champion Julio Cesar chavez jr (50-2)
Canelo tied with undefeated Knockout Artist WBA, WBC , IBF , and IBO middle weight champion Gennady Golovkin.
Won the rematch  a year later including the WBA, WBC  world titles.  Giving GGG his first loss.
Then In December 2018, Canelo would move up to super middleweight 167 for the first time and capture the WBA title with a four-knockdown, third-round TKO of champion Rocky Fielding. who was 6 inches taller.
Then come back down to 159 To give champion  Daniel Jacobs a loss and take his IBF world Title. 
Then in 6 months proceeded to move up 15 pounds to light heavyweight for the first time to defeat world champion Sergey Kovalev and relieve him of the WBO light heavy weight world title.
Canelo then came down a division to 168 to defeat then undefeated world champion callum smith and take his WBA, WBC, and the ring magazine super middle weight titles.
Canelo later on proceeded to fight undefeated world champion Billy joe sanders for the WBO supper middle weight world title. Giving him his first defeat, TKO in the eight round and a fractured face, causing Billy joe Sanders to retire.
Canelo then dropped the 6 inch taller Caleb Plant for the first time in his career  TKO on the 11th round Unifying the IBO, WBO, WBA, and IBF super middle weight world titles. 
Canelo then proceeded to move up in weight again to 175 to challenge a undefeated light heavy weight champion Dmitrii Bivol. 
For the WBA light heavyweight title.
Suffering his second defeat to the 5 inch taller and naturally heavier undefeated champion.
Since then returned to 168 and Had 6 successful defense of his 4, 168 Unified Titles and The Ring super-middleweight titles.
Faced and beat GGG once again.
Dropped  2 timed super middle weight champion John Ryder in the 5th round.
Defeated undisputed junior middleweight champion Jermell Charlo, bringing him to a knee on the 7th round, being down for the second time in his career.
And beating Jaime Munguia by UD, dropping him for the first time in his career on the 4th round.
Gave the undefeated puerto rican fighter Edgar Berlanga his first Loss, dropping him for the 2nd time in his career.
Defeated undefeated william scull, making the larger opponent run all night long.
Crawford became undisputed at welterweight because of 2 fights.
1st against Jeff horn (18-0) won WBO 
2nd Errol Spence (28-0) won IBF, WBA, and WBC.
and the 3 fights that made him undisputed at junior welterweight were against 
Ricky Burns (36-2) won WBO
Viktor Postol (28-0) won WBC 
Julius Indongo (22-0) won IBF and WBA

Canelo has Belts at  154, 160, 168 and 175.
Unified 3 Divisions and has been lineal champion at both middleweight and super middleweight and is the reigning 168-pound lineal champ. Faced 3 Champs that are already enshrined in the International Boxing Hall of Fame.  Soon to be 5 since Gennadiy Golovkin and Terrance Bud Crawford are certain to be, as well.
He is the first and only boxer in history to become an undisputed champion at super middleweight.
